ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "randval" INTEGER /* Random seed used for model initialization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for training */,
  "testing_data" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for testing */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON string containing hyperparameters */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type FOREIGN KEY ("model_type") REFERENCES model_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the model version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., training data, hyperparameters) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metadata_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the result belongs to */,
  "pearson_r" REAL /* Pearson's R value */,
  "rmse" REAL /* RMSE value */,
  "mae" REAL /* MAE value */,
  "abs_pearson_r" REAL /* Absolute Pearson's R value */,
  "abs_rmse" REAL /* Absolute RMSE value */,
  "abs_mae" REAL /* Absolute MAE value */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version the result belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the result */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the result version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the result version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., evaluation metrics) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_metadata_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the result */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., precision, recall) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., learning rate) */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_dataset" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_dataset" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metric_dataset" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_dataset" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id", "dataset_id")
)
